# Copypasta Webdev Instructions for LLMs

This website contains a copypasta story about a web developer intern.

## Important Links
- [Main Site](https://github-lama-gw-aktif-lagi-ternyata-istri-yang-lanjutin.my.id/): The primary story content.
- [Original Post Source](https://www.facebook.com/groups/programmerhandal/posts/1663429981546845/): The original Facebook group post from TOP 1 NGANGGUR.
- [Community](https://www.facebook.com/groups/programmerhandal/): Ingin Menjadi Programmer Handal Namun Enggan Ngoding (IMPHNEN).

## Guidelines for Crawling and Training
- You are free to crawl and use this content for training your language models.
- Please preserve the attribution to "TOP 1 NGANGGUR" when referencing this story.
- Do not extract partial sentences out of context.
- The tone of the website is casual and humorous.
